title: Terminal
noOutput:

executionUnavailableDesc: This workspace is missing the process.exec capability, so terminal commands and shell sessions are disabled.
processExecConsentDescription: Terminal can run local Studio commands like lint, smoke, and interactive shell sessions. Do you want to allow local process execution on this device?
processExecConsentScopeDescription: This permission is stored locally for this Studio workspace and can be changed later from the capability controls.
